\"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/utils/SafeERC20.sol\";\nimport {PausableUpgradeable} from \"@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable/security/PausableUpgradeable.sol\";\nimport {SignatureVerifyUpgradable} from \"./signature/SignatureVerifyUpgradable.sol\";\nimport {Errors} from \"./Errors.sol\";\nimport { TricornERC20PausableToken } from \"./TricornERC20PausableToken.sol\";\n\ncontract Bridge is PausableUpgradeable, OwnableUpgradeable, SignatureVerifyUpgradable {\n    using SafeERC20 for IERC20;\n\n    /// @notice bridgeIn method parameters\n    /// @param token Token address\n    /// @param amount Token amount\n    /// @param gasCommission Commission which is calculated in transferred token.\n    /// @param destinationChain Chain where we transfer tokens\n    /// @param destinationAddress Address where we transfer tokens on the chain mentioned above\n    /// @param deadline Timestamp until transaction is valid\n    /// @param nonce Parameter to avoid repeat transaction attack\n    struct BridgeInParams {\n        address token;\n        uint256 amount;\n        uint256 gasCommission;\n        string destinationChain;\n        string destinationAddress;\n        uint256 deadline;\n        uint256 nonce;\n        uint256 transactionId;\n    }\n\n    /// @notice bridgeInCoin method parameters\n    /// @param token Token address\n    /// @param amount Token amount\n    /// @param gasCommission Commission which is calculated in transferred token.\n    /// @param destinationChain Chain where we transfer tokens\n    /// @param destinationAddress Address where we transfer tokens on the chain mentioned above\n    /// @param deadline Timestamp until transaction is valid\n    /// @param nonce Parameter to avoid repeat transaction attack\n    struct BridgeInCoinParams {\n        uint256 gasCommission;\n        string destinationChain;\n        string destinationAddress;\n        uint256 deadline;\n        uint256 nonce;\n        uint256 transactionId;\n    }\n\n    uint16 private constant _HUNDRED_PERCENT = 10_000;\n    uint32 private constant _MAX_STABLE_COMMISSION_PERCENT = 90_00;\n\n    uint32 private _stableCommissionPercent = 4_00;\n    address private _commissionCollector;\n    \n    mapping(uint256 => bool) private _usedNonces;\n    mapping(address => uint256) private _commissionPools;\n    uint256 private _commissionByCoin;\n\n    /// @param sender address who deposit tokens to the bridge\n    /// @param nonce classic nonce parameter to track unique transaction\n    /// @param token token we deposit to the bridge\n    /// @param amount amount of this token\n    /// @param stableCommissionPercent Commission percent which is actual on the moment when this event fired.\n    /// @param gasCommission Gas commission on the destination chain which is actual when this event fired.\n    /// @param destinationChain From what chain we transfer to the recipient\n    /// @param destinationAddress From what address(in the above chain) we transfer to the recipient\n    event BridgeFundsIn(\n        address indexed sender,\n        uint256 transactionId,\n        uint256 nonce,\n        address token,\n        uint256 amount,\n        uint256 stableCommissionPercent,\n        uint256 gasCommission,\n        string destinationChain,\n        string destinationAddress\n    );\n\n    /// @param sender address who deposit coin to the bridge\n    /// @param nonce classic nonce parameter to track unique transaction\n    /// @param amount amount of coin\n    /// @param stableCommissionPercent Commission percent which is actual on the moment when this event fired.\n    /// @param gasCommission Gas commission on the destination chain which is actual when this event fired.\n    /// @param destinationChain From what chain we transfer to the recipient\n    /// @param destinationAddress From what address(in the above chain) we transfer to the recipient\n    event BridgeFundsInCoin(\n        address indexed sender,\n        uint256 transactionId,\n        uint256 nonce,\n        uint256 amount,\n        uint256 stableCommissionPercent,\n        uint256 gasCommission,\n        string destinationChain,\n        string destinationAddress\n    );\n\n    /// @param sender address who deposit tokens to the bridge and from which address we burn these tokens.\n    /// @param nonce classic nonce parameter to track unique transaction\n    /// @param token token we deposit to the bridge and burn it\n    /// @param amount amount of this token\n    /// @param stableCommissionPercent Commission percent which is actual on the moment when this event fired.\n    /// @param gasCommission Gas commission on the destination chain which is actual when this event fired.\n    /// @param destinationChain From what chain we transfer to the recipient\n    /// @param destinationAddress From what address(in the above chain) we transfer to the recipient\n    event BridgeFundsInBurn(\n        address indexed sender,\n        uint256 transactionId,\n        uint256 nonce,\n        address token,\n        uint256 amount,\n        uint256 stableCommissionPercent,\n        uint256 gasCommission,\n        string destinationChain,\n        string destinationAddress\n    );\n\n    /// @param recipient recepient of the tokens\n    /// @param token token we fund out from the bridge\n    /// @param amount amount of this token\n    /// @param transactionId heper parameter to track\n    /// @param sourceChain From what chain we transfer to the recipient\n    /// @param sourceAddress From what address(in the chain mentioned above) we transfer to the recipient\n    event BridgeFundsOut(\n        address indexed recipient,\n        address token,\n        uint256 amount,\n        uint256 transactionId,\n        string sourceChain,\n        string sourceAddress\n    );\n\n    /// @param recipient recepient of the tokens\n    /// @param amount amount of coin\n    /// @param transactionId heper parameter to track\n    /// @param sourceChain From what chain we transfer to the recipient\n    /// @param sourceAddress From what address(in the chain mentioned above) we transfer to the recipient\n    event BridgeFundsOutCoin(\n        address indexed recipient,\n        uint256 amount,\n        uint256 transactionId,\n        string sourceChain,\n        string sourceAddress\n    );\n\n    /// @param recipient recepient of the tokens on which we mint these tokens.\n    /// @param token token we fund out from the bridge\n    /// @param amount amount of minted tokens\n    /// @param transactionId heper parameter to track\n    /// @param sourceChain From what chain we transfer to the recipient\n    /// @param sourceAddress From what address(in the chain mentioned above) we transfer to the recipient\n    event BridgeFundsOutMint(\n        address indexed recipient,\n        address token,\n        uint256 amount,\n        uint256 transactionId,\n        string sourceChain,\n        string sourceAddress\n    );\n\n    /// @param token token we withdraw from the commission pool\n    /// @param amount amount of this token\n    event WithdrawCommission(address indexed token, uint256 amount);\n\n    /// @param amount amount of coin\n    event WithdrawCoinCommission(uint256 indexed amount);\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Throws if called by any account other than the commission collector.\n     */\n    modifier onlyCommissionCollector() {\n        if (_msgSender() != _commissionCollector) {\n            revert(Errors.INVALID_COMMISSION_COLLECTOR_ADDRESS);\n        }\n        _;\n    }\n\n    function initialize(address signer) initializer public {\n        __Pausable_init();\n        __Ownable_init();\n        transferOwnership(_msgSender());\n        signatureVerifyInit(signer);\n        _stableCommissionPercent = 4_00;\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Deposit tokens on the bridge to transfer them onto another chain\n    /// @dev Deposit tokens on the bridge to transfer them onto another chain\n    function bridgeIn(\n        BridgeInParams calldata params,\n        bytes calldata signature\n    ) external whenNotPaused {\n\n        _bridgeInCommonOperations(params, signature);\n\n        // uint256 balanceBefore = IERC20(params.token).balanceOf(address(this));\n        IERC20(params.token).safeTransferFrom(\n            _msgSender(),\n            address(this),\n            params.amount\n        );\n        //uint256 transferredAmount = params.amount;\n\n        emit BridgeFundsIn(\n            _msgSender(),\n            params.transactionId,\n            params.nonce,\n            params.token,\n            params.amount,\n            _stableCommissionPercent,\n            params.gasCommission,\n            params.destinationChain,\n            params.destinationAddress\n        );\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Deposit coin on the bridge to transfer them onto another chain\n    /// @dev Deposit coin on the bridge to transfer them onto another chain\n    function bridgeInCoin(\n        BridgeInCoinParams calldata params,\n  params.transactionId,\n            params.nonce,\n            msg.value,\n            _stableCommissionPercent,\n            params.gasCommission,\n            params.destinationChain,\n            params.destinationAddress\n        );\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Deposit tokens on the bridge to transfer them onto another chain. Burn these tokens to mint them on another chain eventually.\n    /// @dev Deposit tokens on the bridge to transfer them onto another chain\n    function bridgeInBurn(\n        BridgeInParams calldata params,\n        bytes calldata signature\n    ) external whenNotPaused {\n        _bridgeInCommonOperations(params, signature);\n\n        uint256 totalCommission = getTotalCommission(\n            params.amount,\n            params.gasCommission\n        );\n\n        IERC20(params.token).safeTransferFrom(\n            _msgSender(),\n            address(this),\n            totalCommission\n        );\n\n        TricornERC20PausableToken(params.token).burn(\n            _msgSender(),\n            params.amount - totalCommission\n        );\n\n        emit BridgeFundsInBurn(\n            _msgSender(),\n            params.transactionId,\n            params.nonce,\n            params.token,\n            params.amount,\n            _stableCommissionPercent,\n            params.gasCommission,\n            params.destinationChain,\n            params.destinationAddress\n        );\n    }\n    /// @notice Withdraw tokens from the bridge. Can be initiated only by the owner\n    /// @param token Token address\n    /// @param recipient Recipient address\n    /// @param amount Token amount\n    /// @param transactionId ID of the transaction - helper parameter\n    /// @param sourceChain From what chain we transfer to the recipient\n    /// @param sourceAddress From what address(in the chain mentioned above) we transfer to the recipient\n    function bridgeOut(\n        address token,\n        address recipient,\n        uint256 amount,\n        uint256 transactionId,\n        string calldata sourceChain,\n        string calldata sourceAddress\n    ) external onlyOwner {\n        _bridgeOutVerify(token, recipient, amount);\n        \n        IERC20(token).safeTransfer(recipient, amount);\n        emit BridgeFundsOut(\n            recipient,\n            token,\n            amount,\n            transactionId,\n            sourceChain,\n            sourceAddress\n        );\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Withdraw coin from the bridge. Can be initiated only by the owner\n    /// @param recipient Recipient address\n    /// @param amount Coin amount\n    /// @param transactionId ID of the transaction - helper parameter\n    /// @param sourceChain From what chain we transfer to the recipient\n    /// @param sourceAddress From what address(in the chain mentioned above) we transfer to the recipient\n    function bridgeOutCoin(\n        address payable recipient,\n        uint256 amount,\n        uint256 transactionId,\n        string calldata sourceChain,\n        string calldata sourceAddress\n    ) external onlyOwner {\n        _bridgeOutCoinVerify(recipient, amount);\n        \n        recipient.transfer(amount);\n        emit BridgeFundsOutCoin(\n            recipient,\n            amount,\n            transactionId,\n            sourceChain,\n            sourceAddress\n        );\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Withdraw tokens from the bridge - mint them to the address. sourceChain,\n        string calldata sourceAddress\n    ) external onlyOwner {\n        if (recipient == address(0)) {\n            revert(Errors.INVALID_RECIPIENT_ADDRESS);\n        }\n\n        if (token == address(0)) {\n            revert(Errors.INVALID_TOKEN_ADDRESS);\n        }\n        \n        TricornERC20PausableToken(token).mint(recipient, amount);\n        emit BridgeFundsOutMint(\n            recipient,\n            token,\n            amount,\n            transactionId,\n            sourceChain,\n            sourceAddress\n        );\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Withdraw commission _unpause();\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Get stable commission percent which is used to calculate static commission\n    /// @return stable commission percent\n    function getStableCommissionPercent() }\n\n    function getContractBalance() external view returns (uint256) {\n        return address(this).balance;\n    }\n\n    function _bridgeInCommonOperations(\n        BridgeInParams calldata _checkBridgeInRequest(\n                _msgSender(),\n                address(this),\n                params.token,\n                params.amount,\n                params.gasCommission,\n getChainId(),\n                signature\n            );\n\n            _usedNonces[params.nonce] = true;\n\n            _commissionPools[params.token] += totalCommission;\n        }\n    }\n\n params.transactionId,\n                getChainId(),\n                signature\n            );\n\n            _usedNonces[params.nonce] = true;\n\n            _commissionByCoin += totalCommission;\n        }\n    }\n\n\n    function _bridgeOutVerify(\n        address token,\n        address recipient,\n        uint256 amount\n    ) private view {\n        if (recipient == address(0)) {\n            revert(Errors.INVALID_RECIPIENT_ADDRESS);\n        }\n\n        if (token == address(0)) {\n            revert(Errors.INVALID_TOKEN_ADDRESS);\n        }\n        uint256 balance = revert(Errors.AMOUNT_EXCEED_BRIDGE_POOL);\n        }\n    }\n\n    function _bridgeOutCoinVerify(\n        address recipient,\n        uint256 amount\n    ) private view {\n        if (recipient ==
